data.title: Fluid Quip Technologies deploys Low Energy Distillation™ technology at United Ethanol in Wisconsin to boost efficiency.
data.description: In Cedar Rapids, Iowa, Fluid Quip Technologies (FQT) is making strides in improving the biofuels industry's efficiency and carbon footprint. Their patented Low Energy Distillation™ (LED™) system has been deployed at United Ethanol in Milton, Wisconsin, marking another step forward. The LED™ system is a cutting-edge distillation platform aimed at reducing steam usage and eliminating unnecessary phase changes. It also helps in lowering water consumption and ensuring continuous and reliable operation. This deployment highlights FQT's commitment to enhancing sustainability in the industry.

data.title: Pronto.ai celebrates milestone: North America's first autonomous quarry hauls 2 million tons of limestone. Heidelberg Materials leading the way with mixed fleet in Texas.
data.description: In Lake Bridgeport, Texas, Pronto.ai, Inc. disclosed a notable advancement in the digitization of the aggregates sector. Heidelberg Materials, a leading global manufacturer of building materials, achieved a milestone by autonomously transporting more than two million tons of limestone at its Lake Bridgeport quarry. This success follows a pilot initiative at the Bridgeport site and entails the integration of autonomous hauling technology in a varied fleet of Caterpillar and Komatsu vehicles.

data.title: Microsoft's commitment to fund data center energy costs may lead to $4 trillion valuation predicted by Daniel Newman.
data.description: Market experts are praising Microsoft Corp. (NASDAQ: MSFT) for its decision to fully fund its data center energy costs. The Futurum Group CEO Daniel Newman believes this move could lead the tech giant to reclaim a $4 trillion valuation. Newman highlighted Microsoft's plan to build between 80 and 200 new data centers, which would put a significant strain on local power grids. By covering these expenses, Microsoft is shielding ratepayers from the potential financial burden. Newman expressed support for this initiative, emphasizing the importance of not passing on the costs of infrastructure expansion to consumers. The full report can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: New president Vince Finaldi to lead Pebble Beach Concours d'Elegance after its 75th celebration in August.
data.description: Vince Finaldi has been appointed as the new President of the Pebble Beach Concours d'Elegance team in Pebble Beach, California. The announcement comes shortly after the prestigious event's 75th anniversary celebration in August. The global automotive event will experience a notable change on October 1, following Finaldi's appointment.

data.title: CMU introduces Central Career Guarantee program, ensuring job or grad school offers for graduates.
data.description: In Mount Pleasant, Michigan on January 15, 2026, Central Michigan University made history by being the first public university in the state to ensure that all its graduates will secure job offers or graduate school acceptances. This guarantee includes financial aid for those who do not meet this benchmark.

data.title: Flu season sees highest levels on record nationwide - over 15 million cases reported - travel insurance can help.
data.description: In St. Petersburg, Florida on January 15, 2026, it was reported that flu hospitalizations and deaths have surged across the United States to unprecedented levels. The latest CDC surveillance data reveals that more than 15 million flu cases have been documented. This rise in flu-related illnesses and fatalities underscores the severity of the current flu season. The city of St. Petersburg serves as a backdrop for the concerning trend in the nation's health landscape as more individuals are affected by this seasonal virus.

data.title: ViaPath Technologies and The Change Companies partner to enhance behavior change programs in corrections. Collaboration leverages the Atlas platform.
data.description: In Falls Church, Virginia, on January 15, 2026, ViaPath Technologies has revealed a new partnership with The Change Companies, a prominent figure in behavioral health and justice system programs. The collaboration showcases the merging of their Atlas platform, renowned for its innovative solutions, aiming to revolutionize services in these sectors.

data.title: Opportunity for three couples to renew vows at Junior's on Feb. 13 and win a NYC honeymoon. Cheesecake lovers unite!
data.description: Three lucky couples with heartwarming love stories have the chance to reaffirm their vows at a renowned Brooklyn restaurant and secure a romantic honeymoon in New York City. The exciting opportunity, happening on Valentine's Day, combines love and cheese in a unique way. Junior's Restaurant is offering this special experience to the selected couples.

data.title: Aembit unveils NHIcon 2026 agenda for Agentic AI Security conference on Jan. 27, focusing on challenges and solutions.
data.description: In Silver Spring, MD, on January 15, 2026, Aembit unveiled details regarding NHIcon 2026: The Rise of Agentic AI Security. Set for January 27, this virtual conference will address key industry issues through its agenda and lineup of speakers. The second edition of this annual event will delve into technical, operational, and security hurdles faced in the field.

data.title: Hoth Therapeutics reaches EU regulatory milestone for HT-001 oncology trial, advancing to multi-country site activation.
data.description: The company has successfully achieved a positive regulatory conclusion from the EU, specifically for their oncology-focused clinical program. Their multi-country European trial footprint has been established, enabling a clear line of sight for site activation and enrollment. They are anticipating near-term regulatory and operational catalysts. The positive conclusion from CTIS sets the company up for near-term clinical trial readiness. Important numbers include multiple countries involved, upcoming catalysts, and a focus on oncology trials in Europe.

data.title: Bitcoin surges, hitting $97,000 fueled by $843M ETF inflows. $1.71B capital raised in 3 days after cautious positioning. BlackRock's IBIT leads charge with $648M, Fidelity's FBTC adds $125.4M, and Ark & 21Shares' ARKB attracts $27M.
data.description: US Bitcoin ETFs saw a significant influx of $843.62 million in a single day, marking the highest daily total since October 7. This surge in institutional investment comes after three months of cautious activity, propelling Bitcoin towards testing the key resistance level of $100,000. Over a three-day period, these ETFs attracted a total of $1.71 billion, showcasing a complete turnaround from early January when they experienced outflows of $1.38 billion between January 6-9. The shift occurred rapidly, with Tuesday witnessing $753.73 million inflows—then surpassed by Wednesday's $843.62 million, making it the largest single day since October 7. Leading the inflow charge was BlackRock's IBIT with $648 million, followed by Fidelity's FBTC with $125.4 million and Ark & 21Shares' ARKB with $27 million. This resurgence indicates a renewed confidence in the cryptocurrency market among investors.

data.title: DASH partners with ABM to install pantograph charger for EV buses in Alexandria, marking key step in fleet electrification.
data.description: The installation of a pantograph charger and essential electrical infrastructure by ABM signifies a significant achievement in DASH's plan to electrify its fleet. This development serves as a pivotal milestone, showcasing progress towards transitioning to electric vehicles. This initiative underscores DASH's commitment to sustainable practices and reducing carbon emissions. The incorporation of these components lays the groundwork for enhancing the operational efficiency and sustainability of DASH's fleet. This strategic move by ABM represents a crucial step towards fulfilling DASH's goal of electrifying their fleet, with the potential to significantly impact the reduction of greenhouse gas emissions and promote environmental conservation.
